title: Dental Prosthesis Technology Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Dental Prosthesis Technology Program Learning Outcomes

Program Learning Outcomes

1. Knows the Dental Prosthesis laboratory environment and its operation.

2. Accepts the dental models coming to the Dental Prosthesis laboratory, prepares the dental models according to the desired measurements.

3. Explains Dental Prosthesis laboratory hygiene, safety and waste management.

4. Has basic, current and applied information about his/her profession.

5. Has information about occupational health and safety, environmental awareness and quality processes.

6. Effectively uses information technologies (software, program, animation etc.) related to his/her profession.

7. Follows current developments and applications for his/her profession and uses them effectively.

8. Has the ability to evaluate professional problems and issues independently with an analytical and critical approach and to present a solution proposal.

9. Can effectively present his/her thoughts in written and verbal communication at the level of knowledge and skills and express them in an understandable way.

10. Takes responsibility as a team member to solve unforeseen complex problems encountered in applications related to his/her field.

11. Uses technology and laboratory tools related to the field of Dental Prosthesis Technology.

12. Acts in accordance with the laws, regulations, legislation, professional ethics and human rights related to the duties, rights and responsibilities required by his/her profession.

13. Has experience in working with other related disciplines.
